page.title: Team
page.noRestaurant: No restaurant linked to this account.

invite.title: Invite staff
invite.hint: Send an invitation by email. The link expires in 14 days.

errors.forbidden: You don’t have permission to invite staff.
errors.invalid_input: Check the email address and the role.

enrol.title: Set up your authenticator
enrol.intro: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, etc.) and enter the 6-digit code it shows.
enrol.secretIntro: Or enter this code into your app:

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.introDisabled: A second factor on your account means a stolen password isn't enough to sign in. We recommend using an authenticator app on your phone.
twoFactor.enabledText: Enabled. Sign-in requires a code from your app.

recovery.title: Recovery codes
recovery.intro: Codes you save in a safe place. Each one signs you in once if you lose your authenticator. Using a recovery code disables your authenticator and prompts you to set up a new one.
recovery.confirmInvalidate: This will invalidate your existing {remaining} unused code(s). Continue?
recovery.warning: These codes will not be shown again. Save them now.

password.title: Password
password.intro: Changing your password signs you out of all your sessions on every device.
password.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.errorBreached: This password has appeared in a breach. Please choose another.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.intro: Sign out of every device you're signed in on, including this one.
sessions.confirm: Sign out from every device, including this one?
